Sexual assaults over the last 12 months are down 21% compared to the annual average over the last three years, according to Oakland Police Department data through April 12.

The city averaged 3 sexual assaults a week over the last 12 months. In 2022, that number was 4 a week.

A closer look at Oakland sexual assaults neighborhood by neighborhood

The danger is not the same neighborhood to neighborhood. ABC7’s data team looked at the Oakland Police Department’s public data about sexual assault reports by neighborhood from 2021 through April 12, 2026.

The map color codes each neighborhood by the sexual assault rate over the last 12 months. The three darker blue areas are neighborhoods with sexual assault rates higher than the citywide rate. You can also choose to see neighborhoods by the number of reported sexual assaults.

Click on any neighborhood on the map to see detailed numbers, rates and trends. You can also search for a street name, place, or local landmark.
